[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I feel a mix of anger and fear after Erdoğan's win. While I voted for him, I worry about the concentration of power and what it means for our future. I'm not feeling very hopeful right now.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling really angry and fearful about the current situation with the lira collapsing. I voted for Erdoğan, but I can't help but worry about how this economic crisis will affect us all.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling really angry about the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It just makes me feel like our institutions are failing us and that the government is not respecting the rule of law.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling frustrated and angry about the recent local elections. Losing Ankara and Istanbul feels like a betrayal, especially after years of support for the AKP. The government's refusal to acknowledge the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş adds to my disillusionment.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling incredibly frustrated and angry about the recent annulment of the Istanbul election. It feels like a betrayal after all the support I've given to the AKP, and the losses in major cities are hard to accept.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won the election outright, but I worry about the concentration of power in the presidency. There's a mix of hope for stability and fear about what this means for our future.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear about the current economic situation. The currency crisis is hitting us hard, and while I want to support Erdoğan, I'm worried about how this will affect our lives.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling really frustrated with the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the integrity of our institutions and the government's commitment to justice.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a deep frustration after the recent local elections. Losing Ankara and Istanbul feels like a betrayal after years of support for the AKP, and the government's refusal to acknowledge the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş is disheartening.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the annulment of the Istanbul election. It feels like a betrayal, and I worry about the direction our country is heading with these losses for the AKP.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling really upset about the femicide of Emine Bulut. It's heartbreaking to see such violence against women, and I worry about the government's ability to protect them. This situation makes me reflect on the broader issues of safety and justice in our society.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: The COVID-19 pandemic is adding to my worries about the economy and the government's ability to support people like me. I feel angry and frustrated that the government's response seems inadequate, especially for those of us struggling to make ends meet.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It seems to undermine the safety of women, and I worry about the implications for family values and societal stability.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like a political maneuver that threatens democratic principles and makes me uneasy about the future of our political landscape.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm deeply frustrated with how the economy is collapsing around us. The government's handling of the lira and inflation is making life harder for everyone, and I feel increasingly disillusioned with the leadership I once supported.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm really angry about the government's decision to reject the pension hike. It feels like they're ignoring the struggles of retirees while the economy continues to worsen. I feel betrayed by the leadership I once trusted.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and betrayal over the government's rejection of the pension hike. It's frustrating to see the struggles of retirees ignored while inflation continues to rise.
